cooling_failure: It wasnt even a year old when it stopped making ice. So I contacted seller . They wanted a vidoe of the problem,so I made one . I has a hard time uploading it. It was great until it wasnt. It stopped working after about 9 months - would not get cold to make ice.
I turned it off for winter but decided I'd turn back on.  After 2 1/2 months turned off, it stopped freezing. Never changed it's spot. It will not freeze! Can't contact manufacturer for help!
stopped_working: It broke after owning it for a year, it will start the cycle to make ice but then stop. Loved them machine but sad it broke.

I LOVED this for 18 months, but METAL parts in WATER = rusty ice. First I noticed a couple months ago there was orange residue in my tank. So I assumed I got bad water, cleaned it out and refilled it.

The problem is it has no self cleaning feature, has a bunch of metal parts, and doesn't stay particularly cold inside. So while it excels at making ice, rust and mold are also things it is quite effective at making. Not particularly healthy things to drink.

We had this for about a year and a half before it eventually failed.  During its use though, it did make ice fast. The reoccurring problem we had with it though, was that it was difficult to clean. A brownish film would get in very hard to reach areas after only about 2 weeks of use. We always used bottled spring water as well. I believe it was this build up that eventually led to its failure. I bought this based on the high reviews.  I did not realize how noisy it would be when regenerating ice.  That said, I can live with the noise. What I can’t live with, is the awful chlorine flavor.  We have our whole house on a water filter and we only use filtered, reverse osmosis water.  Four days into using this machine, all of the ice started having a strong chlorine taste.  Will be returning.
